hotspots.title: Trump’s Iran war escalation and diplomacy
hotspots.blurb: President Trump's administration continues to face intense scrutiny over its military actions in Iran, including the ongoing blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and the rejection of a new Iranian peace proposal. The U.S. has announced 'Project Freedom' to guide ships through the strait, escalating tensions further.
hotspots.affect: This story commands disproportionate attention due to its high-stakes geopolitical implications, moral outrage over civilian impacts, and polarized contention between Trump's supporters and critics.

hotspots.title: Javier Milei’s governance and scandals
hotspots.blurb: Argentine President Javier Milei faces declining approval ratings and multiple scandals, including allegations of illicit enrichment against his Chief of Staff, Manuel Adorni. Milei's government is also under fire for its economic policies and alleged disinformation campaigns in Latin America.
hotspots.affect: This hotspot is charged due to the moral outrage over corruption allegations, economic hardship framing, and polarized contention between Milei's supporters and critics.

hotspots.title: FrP racism scandal and fallout
hotspots.blurb: Norway's Progress Party (FrP) faces a major scandal after a senior advisor, Hårek Hansen, was recorded making racist remarks about Pakistani-Norwegians. The comments have sparked widespread condemnation and internal party turmoil, with calls for disciplinary action against Hansen.
hotspots.affect: This story is highly charged due to the moral outrage over racist language, polarized contention within the party, and the broader debate on immigration and integration in Norway.

hotspots.title: Reform UK’s migrant detention plan
hotspots.blurb: Reform UK has proposed building migrant detention centers in areas controlled by the Green Party, aiming to deport tens of thousands of illegal migrants. The plan has sparked outrage and accusations of divisive politics.
hotspots.affect: This hotspot is charged due to the alarmist framing of immigration, polarized contention between Reform UK and opposition parties, and moral outrage over the targeting of specific political constituencies.

hotspots.title: Vox’s ‘national priority’ and regional pacts
hotspots.blurb: Vox continues to push its 'national priority' agenda in regional governments, particularly in Aragon and Extremadura, where it has formed coalitions with the PP. The policy aims to prioritize Spanish citizens in public services and has sparked controversy over its legality and morality.
hotspots.affect: This story is charged due to the moral outrage over discriminatory policies, polarized contention between Vox and opposition parties, and the broader debate on nationalism and immigration in Spain.
